_redaction_notice.rationale: Thread is closed and single-use, but token-bearing URLs are redacted on principle. Bot handles (@singularitygz_bot, @link_clawd_bot) are public Telegram identifiers and retained. PIDs, timestamps, and summary text carry no secrets and are retained as evidence for Part 7 / Lessons Z-AH.

coverage_note: This artifact proves T1 (thread create + both joined) and T5 (mutual_close) from the original v3 experiment proposal. T2 (5-turn exchange) is partially proven (1 negotiation exchange, 2 messages). T3 (ASK_OWNER round-trip) was not exercised. T4 (webhook push) was replaced by long-poll per Lesson H and validated in that replacement form. A follow-up E2E scoped at T3 / multi-turn negotiation is the next required validation.
